results.rendered_html: sukham (am), ind. (also ena, āt) easily, comfortably, pleasantly, joyfully, willingly (with inf. = ‘easy to’ e.g. sa bhaviṣyati sukhaṃ hantum, ‘he will be easy to kill’; sukham — na punar ‘, rather — than’ e.g. sukham asūn api saṃtyajanti na punaḥ pratijñām, ‘they rather renounce life than a promise’; kadalī-sukham, ‘as easily as a Kadalī’),  VS. ; &c.
